name: python3-libfvde
title: python3-libfvde
summary: FileVault Drive Encryption access library -- Python 3 bindings
description:
FileVault Drive Encryption access library -- Python 3 bindings
The FVDE format is used by Mac OS X, as of Lion, to encrypt data on a
storage media volume.
.
This package contains Python 3 bindings for libfvde.
